body_excerpt: {"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/46844074?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gonzaless95/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gonzaless95/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gonzaless95/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gonzaless95/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/gonzaless95", "id": 46844074, "login": "gonzaless95", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjQ2ODQ0MDc0", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gonzaless95/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gonzaless95/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gonzaless95/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gonzaless95/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gonzaless95/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/gonzaless95", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-55795", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-307", "name": "Improper Restriction of Excessive Authentication Attempts"}], "description": "### Summary The CartController defines a RateLimiter behavior that is only activated when the 'number' POST/GET parameter is explicitly provided. ### Details When an attacker submits coupon codes against the session-based cart (without passing a 'number' parameter), no rate limiting is applied. This allows unlimited attempts to guess coupon codes. **Vulnerable Code** ### PoC Complete instructions, including specific configuration details, to reproduce the vulnerability. ### Impact An attacker can enumerate all coupon codes through automated requests. **Remediation** Apply rate limiting unconditionally on actionUpdateCart regardless of whether 'number' is present.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-h5gm-x9wr-vhcm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T21:15:26Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-h5gm-x9wr-vhcm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-h5gm-x9wr-vhcm"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-55795"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T21:15:26Z", "references": ["https://github.com/craftcms/commerce/security/advisories/GHSA-h5gm-x9wr-vhcm", "https://github.com/craftcms/commerce/commit/df22c4f9c4ea7fb7857d833f755e49ea6f9f5bb5", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-h5gm-x9wr-vhcm"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/craftcms/commerce/security-advisories/GHSA-h5gm-x9wr-vhcm", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/craftcms/commerce", "summary": "Craft Commerce: Coupon Code Brute-Force via Rate Limit Bypass", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T21:15:26Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-h5gm-x9wr-vhcm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.6.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "craftcms/commerce"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 5.0.0, <= 5.6.4"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.11.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "craftcms/commerce"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.0.0, <= 4.11.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Craft Commerce: Coupon Code Brute-Force via Rate Limit Bypass
